title: Senior Software Engineer - FarmERP South Asia Partners - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - FarmERP South Asia Partners - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at FarmERP South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Ranchi-based team.

About FarmERP South Asia Partners:
FarmERP South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FarmERP South Asia Partners!
